description: Long-term memory schema for GOA. Used lightly — mainly for scout inter-run context and watermark supplement. Primary state lives in Cloud SQL.

keys.description: Summary of the scout's last discovery run: sources found, sources proposed, reasoning. Used to avoid re-discovering the same sources.
List of source names/URLs the scout has already proposed, to avoid duplicating proposals.
Human-provided notes on gate calibration — what to look for or avoid. Informs future classifier prompts.

not_in_memory: Opportunity records — these live in Cloud SQL (serving) and BigQuery (lake)
Watermarks — these live in Cloud SQL watermark table
Rules and scope — these live in Cloud SQL screening_rule and scope tables
Seen events and rejections — these live in Cloud SQL seen_event and rejection tables
